▸ View the Survey Results

Founded in 2005, Nonprofit Tech for Good provides useful, easy-to-understand news and resources related to digital marketing and fundraising.

Today, with 50,000+ monthly visitors and more than one million followers on social media, Nonprofit Tech for Good is a leading technology resource for nonprofit professionals.

Our Programs

► Certificate in Digital Marketing & Fundraising
► Free & Low-cost Webinars
► The Open Data Project
► Sponsorship Opportunities
